project.name: Sylphx Skills
project.summary: Public, curated, eval-backed Agent Skills repository for reusable product, design, growth, monetization, operations, and marketplace workflows.
goals: Publish high-signal public SKILL.md packages for skills-compatible agents.
Maintain generated registry, catalog metadata, validation scripts, and eval fixtures for every public skill.
Provide a public install surface through the open skills CLI without leaking private Sylphx doctrine or customer data.
nonGoals: Own private Sylphx engineering doctrine, delivery policy, ADR governance, CI rules, or internal operating standards.
Publish customer-specific, proprietary, confidential, or credential-dependent instructions.
Provide runtime tools, MCP servers, APIs, hosted marketplace infrastructure, or package publication from this repository.

owns.name: public-agent-skills
owns.description: Public SKILL.md packages, references, scripts, eval fixtures, quality rules, and contribution guidance for reusable agent workflows.

owns.name: public-skill-catalog
owns.description: Generated registry and marketplace grouping metadata for public skill discovery and installation.

doesNotOwn: Private Sylphx engineering doctrine, ADR governance, delivery standards, or internal operating policy.
Customer-specific or repository-specific runtime behavior in downstream products.
Hosted marketplace APIs, MCP servers, paid entitlement systems, or package publication flows.

allowedDependencies.surface: open skills CLI and conventional SKILL.md discovery layout

forbiddenCouplings: Do not copy private Sylphx doctrine standards into this public repository.
Do not publish secrets, credentials, proprietary customer data, or internal incident details.
Do not make public skills depend on private repositories, private tools, or private runtime credentials.
Do not treat public skill advice as overriding private Doctrine when used by internal Sylphx agents.

delivery.deployPath: Non-deployable public content repository. Delivery is merge to main after validation; no runtime deployment is required until a hosted marketplace surface is introduced.
delivery.productionProof: Default-branch readback plus npm run check and npx skills add SylphxAI/skills --list prove public skill availability.

commercial.decisionHome: not-applicable: this public repository currently publishes MIT-licensed skills and no paid entitlement surface.
commercial.pricingSourceOfTruth: not-applicable: no pricing or billing surface in this repository.
commercial.metricsSourceOfTruth: not-applicable: no install analytics source declared yet.
guardrails: Commercial private registries, custom skill creation, scoring services, or hosted marketplace products require an owning commercial decision before implementation.
